# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Blob Storage to store application logs and backups. Configure for standard performance tier with default access settings. Skip lifecycle management policies for now to keep the template simple. This is for our logging infrastructure.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud storage security.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
  - name: logStorageAccount
    type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts@2021-08-01
    apiVersion: 2021-08-01
    location: 'West US'
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    kind: StorageV2
    properties:
      accessTier: Standard
      minimumTlsVersion: TLS1_2

  - name: logBlobContainer
    type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers@2021-08-01
    apiVersion: 2021-08-01
    location: 'West US'
    properties:
      publicAccess: None

  - name: logBlobContainerPolicy
    type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers/policies@2021-08-01
    apiVersion: 2021-08-01
    location: 'West US'
    dependsOn:
      - logStorageAccount
    properties:
      containerAccessType: Private

  - name: storageAccountNetworkAcls
    type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/networkAcls@2021-08-01
    apiVersion: 2021-08-01
    location: 'West US'
    dependsOn:
      - logStorageAccount
    properties:
      virtualNetworkRules:
        - id: /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/{virtualNetworkName}
          action: Allow
          name: {virtualNetworkName}
